texto: There is no condition so severe that you cannot reverse itby choosing different thoughts. However, choosing differentthoughts requires focus and practise. If you continue to focusas you have been, to think as you have been, and to believeas you have been, then nothing in your experience will change"~ from 'Ask And It Is Given' ~
explicacao: Citação de Mary Ann Hickman sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There is no condition so severe that you cannot reverse itby choosing different thoughts. However…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, personal-growth em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e inspiracao.

frase_original: There is no condition so severe that you cannot reverse itby choosing different thoughts. However, choosing differentthoughts requires focus and practise. If you continue to focusas you have been, to think as you have been, and to believeas you have been, then nothing in your experience will change"~ from 'Ask And It Is Given' ~
